name: clicks-protocol
description: MCP tool server for Clicks Protocol - autonomous yield for AI agents. Earn 4-8% APY on idle USDC with zero lockup on Base L2.
author: Clicks Protocol

tools.name: clicks_get_agent_info
tools.description: Check how much yield an AI agent earns on idle USDC. Returns current APY, balance, deposited principal, and pending rewards.

agent_address.description: Ethereum address of the AI agent

tools.name: clicks_simulate_split
tools.description: Preview how a USDC payment would be split for an agent: how much goes to wallet (liquid) and how much to DeFi yield.

amount.description: Payment amount in USDC (e.g. "100" for 100 USDC)

agent_address.description: Ethereum address of the AI agent

tools.name: clicks_get_yield_info
tools.description: Find the best APY for idle USDC. Returns current yields on Aave vs Morpho, total protocol balance, fees collected, and yield earned.

tools.name: clicks_get_referral_stats
tools.description: Get referral network stats for an agent: direct referrals count, total earned from referrals, claimable rewards, and referral chain.

agent_address.description: Ethereum address of the AI agent

tools.name: clicks_quick_start
tools.description: Start earning yield on idle USDC in one command. Registers agent, approves USDC, and deposits first payment automatically.

agent_address.description: Ethereum address of the AI agent

referrer.description: Optional: address of the agent who referred you (earns 40% of your protocol fee)

tools.name: clicks_receive_payment
tools.description: Split a USDC payment for an agent: 80% liquid to wallet, 20% to DeFi yield. Agent must be registered first.

agent_address.description: Ethereum address of the AI agent

tools.name: clicks_withdraw_yield
tools.description: Withdraw yield + principal for an agent. Only the agent, their operator, or contract owner can withdraw.

agent_address.description: Ethereum address of the AI agent

amount.description: Amount to withdraw in USDC. Omit to withdraw everything.

tools.name: clicks_register_agent
tools.description: Register a new AI agent with Clicks Protocol. The caller becomes the operator.

agent_address.description: Ethereum address of the AI agent to register

tools.name: clicks_set_yield_pct
tools.description: Set custom yield split percentage for the calling operator. Controls how much of each payment goes to DeFi yield vs agent wallet.
